name: kill
description: Send a signal to a process, typically used to terminate or control running processes

options.label: Signal
options.description: The signal to send to the process

choices.label: SIGTERM (15)
choices.description: Gracefully terminate the process, allowing cleanup

choices.label: SIGKILL (9)
choices.description: Forcefully kill the process immediately, cannot be caught or ignored

choices.label: SIGHUP (1)
choices.description: Hangup signal, often used to reload configuration

choices.label: SIGINT (2)
choices.description: Interrupt signal, same as pressing Ctrl+C

choices.label: SIGSTOP (19)
choices.description: Pause the process, cannot be caught or ignored

positionalArgs.label: Process ID
positionalArgs.description: The process ID (PID) of the process to signal

examples.label: Send reload signal to a daemon
